ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "total_population" REAL /* Total population of the country */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Population growth rate of the country */,
  "urban_population" REAL /* Urban population of the country */,
  "rural_population" REAL /* Rural population of the country */,
  "fertility_rate" REAL /* Fertility rate of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_data" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "literacy_rate" REAL /* Adult literacy rate of the country */,
  "primary_enrollment" REAL /* Gross enrollment ratio in primary education */,
  "secondary_enrollment" REAL /* Gross enrollment ratio in secondary education */,
  "tertiary_enrollment" REAL /* Gross enrollment ratio in tertiary education */,
  "mean_years_of_schooling" REAL /* Mean years of schooling in the country */,
  "expected_years_of_schooling" REAL /* Expected years of schooling in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "internet_data" (
  "internet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each internet data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "users_per_100" REAL /* Internet users per 100 people */,
  "total_users" INTEGER /* Total number of internet users */,
  "fixed_broadband_users_per_100" REAL /* Fixed broadband users per 100 people */,
  "mobile_broadband_users_per_100" REAL /* Mobile broadband users per 100 people */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("internet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_internet_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "economic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "gdp_growth" REAL /* Annual GDP growth rate */,
  "gdp_per_capita_growth" REAL /* Annual GDP per capita growth rate */,
  "gdp_current_usd" REAL /* Current GDP in USD */,
  "gdp_per_capita_current_usd" REAL /* Current GDP per capita in USD */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the country */,
  "gini_coefficient" REAL /* Gini coefficient of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_development_data" (
  "research_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research and development data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "expenditure_pc_gdp" REAL /* Research and development expenditure as a percentage of GDP */,
  "researchers_per_million" REAL /* Number of researchers per million people */,
  "patents_per_million" REAL /* Number of patents per million people */,
  "sci_tech_journal_articles" REAL /* Number of scientific and technical journal articles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_development_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mobile_data" (
  "mobile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mobile data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "subscriptions" INTEGER /* Total mobile subscriptions */,
  "subscriptions_per_100" REAL /* Mobile subscriptions per 100 people */,
  "mobile_coverage" REAL /* Mobile coverage in the country */,
  "mobile_broadband_speed" REAL /* Average mobile broadband speed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mobile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mobile_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fixed_phone_data" (
  "fixed_phone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fixed phone data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "subscriptions" INTEGER /* Total fixed phone subscriptions */,
  "subscriptions_per_100" REAL /* Fixed phone subscriptions per 100 people */,
  "fixed_phone_coverage" REAL /* Fixed phone coverage in the country */,
  "fixed_broadband_speed" REAL /* Average fixed broadband speed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fixed_phone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fixed_phone_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fixed_broadband_data" (
  "fixed_broadband_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fixed broadband data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "subscriptions" INTEGER /* Total fixed broadband subscriptions */,
  "subscriptions_per_100" REAL /* Fixed broadband subscriptions per 100 people */,
  "fixed_broadband_coverage" REAL /* Fixed broadband coverage in the country */,
  "fixed_broadband_speed" REAL /* Average fixed broadband speed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fixed_broadband_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fixed_broadband_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_data" (
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patent data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "nonresident_applications" INTEGER /* Number of non-resident patent applications */,
  "resident_applications" INTEGER /* Number of resident patent applications */,
  "patent_grants" INTEGER /* Number of patent grants */,
  "patents_in_force" INTEGER /* Number of patents in force */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trademark_data" (
  "trademark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trademark data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "nonresident_applications" INTEGER /* Number of non-resident trademark applications */,
  "resident_applications" INTEGER /* Number of resident trademark applications */,
  "total_applications" INTEGER /* Total number of trademark applications */,
  "trademark_grants" INTEGER /* Number of trademark grants */,
  "trademarks_in_force" INTEGER /* Number of trademarks in force */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trademark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trademark_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment_data" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "primary_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in primary education */,
  "secondary_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in secondary education */,
  "tertiary_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in tertiary education */,
  "dropout_rate" REAL /* Dropout rate in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_enrollment_data" (
  "school_enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school enrollment data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "primary_female_pc" REAL /* Percentage of female students enrolled in primary education */,
  "primary_male_pc" REAL /* Percentage of male students enrolled in primary education */,
  "secondary_female_pc" REAL /* Percentage of female students enrolled in secondary education */,
  "secondary_male_pc" REAL /* Percentage of male students enrolled in secondary education */,
  "tertiary_female_pc" REAL /* Percentage of female students enrolled in tertiary education */,
  "tertiary_male_pc" REAL /* Percentage of male students enrolled in tertiary education */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_enrollment_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "government_expenditure_data" (
  "government_expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each government expenditure data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "education_pc_gdp" REAL /* Government expenditure on education as a percentage of GDP */,
  "health_pc_gdp" REAL /* Government expenditure on health as a percentage of GDP */,
  "military_pc_gdp" REAL /* Government expenditure on military as a percentage of GDP */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("government_expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_government_expenditure_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "data_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
